component.name: Smart Pinyin
component.summary: Smart Chinese Pinyin and Zhuyin input method with user phrase learning

description.p: Smart Pinyin is a fork of ibus-libpinyin with enhanced user phrase learning. It uses a SQLite-based database to remember custom words and phrases, promoting frequently used ones to the top of the candidate list.
Input methods are typing systems allowing users to input complex languages. They are necessary because these contain too many characters to simply be laid out on a traditional keyboard.
